description: Capability for the main window. The front-end invokes 11 custom commands, listens for 2 custom events, reads window state via core:window:default, and drives the custom title-bar via 4 core:window action commands (start-dragging / minimize / toggle-maximize / close). Other plugin commands (dialog/store/autostart/opener/single-instance) are invoked exclusively from Rust, so they need no front-end permissions.
